channel.title: coursera on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in coursera on Frank Huang

item.title: Computational Thinking for Problem Solving
item.description: Starting from today, I decided to start learning courses in coursera and get some note about the coursed that I took. Starting from the first one is Computational Thinking for Problem Solving. In our daily life, we are facing different problems and in order to solve them, computational thinking could be a suitable way to do that. decomposition: devide a huge problem to sub managable problems. pattern recognition: finding similarities in sub problems.
